calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-17-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
B. Kyle Childress for executor Melissa Li (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on a Petition for Spousal Property. Counsel advised that if the will's bequest transferring the decedent's interest in community property to the trust precluded a spousal transfer, there was no reason to pursue the petition further. Counsel further explained that tracing certain assets, including stock holdings, was complicated, and suggested that the transfer instead proceed through the trust's pour-over provisions.

Following discussion, the Court denied the petition without prejudice and indicated the parties may proceed through the pour-over process and seek further relief as appropriate.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-20-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
B. Kyle Childress for petitioner Melissa Li (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary.

The Court inquired whether there were any objections to the petition or the admitting of the will. No objections were raised.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated July 13, 2025, is admitted to probate. Melissa Li is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for April 26, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
